config.max-loved-gifts.name: Max loved gifts to show
config.max-loved-gifts.tooltip: The maximum number of loved gifts shown when hovering over a birthday icon.
config.exclude-universal-loves.name: Exclude universal loves
config.exclude-universal-loves.tooltip: If enabled, only NPC-specific loved gifts are shown (universal loves like Prismatic Shard are hidden).
config.only-show-owned-gifts.name: Only show owned gifts
config.only-show-owned-gifts.tooltip: If enabled, only loved gifts you currently own (inventory, chests, fridge, dressers) are shown.
